targets.rawSql:
SELECT TimeUnix AS time, MetricName AS metric, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName IN ('grl.train.loss', 'grl.train.pg_loss', 'grl.train.kl')
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, MetricName AS metric, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName IN ('grl.train.grad_norm', 'grl.train.clip_fraction', 'grl.train.ratio_mean')
ORDER BY TimeUnix

panels.title: Grad norm / clip fraction / ratio mean

targets.rawSql:
SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.train.reward'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.train.advantage'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName = 'grl.train.policy_version'

SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName = 'grl.train.rollouts_used'

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['reason'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.train.groups_dropped'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.train.step.duration'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.train.weight_sync.duration'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['done_reason'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.completed'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['cause'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.truncated'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,

    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.tool_calls'

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,

    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.reward'
  GROUP BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing

    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.num_turns'
  GROUP BY t

WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.policy_staleness'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS time,
       sum(Sum) / nullIf(sum(Count), 0) AS mean
FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.response_tokens'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.duration'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['grl.role'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName = 'grl.rollout.in_flight'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['pod'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:num_requests_running'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['pod'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:gpu_cache_usage_perc'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['pod'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:num_requests_waiting'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['pod'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics_sum_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:prompt_tokens_total'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['pod'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics_sum_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:generation_tokens_total'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95

  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'vllm' AND MetricName = 'vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, MetricName AS metric, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName IN ('grl.pipeline.pending_tasks.depth', 'grl.pipeline.completed_rollouts.depth', 'grl.pipeline.train_batches.depth')
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, MetricName AS metric, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName IN ('grl.pipeline.groups.partial', 'grl.pipeline.groups.ready')
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['reason'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.pipeline.batch.emitted'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.pipeline.batch.size'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.pipeline.group.assembly.duration'
  GROUP BY t
)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         '' AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.pipeline.group.timeout'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

WITH grouped AS (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['rpc'] AS k,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ResourceAttributes['run.id'] = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.env.rpc.duration'
  GROUP BY t, k
)
SELECT time, series, value FROM (
  SELECT t AS time, concat(k, ' p50') AS series, arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS value
  FROM grouped WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT t AS time, concat(k, ' p95') AS series, arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS value
  FROM grouped WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
)
ORDER BY time

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['grl.role'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
  AND MetricName = 'grl.env.active'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['rpc'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND RunId = '${run_id}'
    AND MetricName = 'grl.env.rpc.errors'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta

  GROUP BY t, series

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['pod'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.envs.active'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['pod'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.vms.active'

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['phase'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.envs.by_phase'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['pod'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.capacity.utilization'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         '' AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics_sum_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.admission.rejected'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['ok'] AS series, max(Value) AS v
  FROM default.grl_metrics_sum_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.vm.boots'
  GROUP BY t, series
)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         sumForEach(BucketCounts) AS bc, any(ExplicitBounds) AS eb
  FROM default.grl_metrics_histogram_landing
  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
    AND ServiceName = 'grl-manager' AND MetricName = 'grl.manager.vm.boot.duration'

)
WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,

  WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')

)
ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.5 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p50,
  arrayElement(eb, greatest(1, least(arrayFirstIndex(c -> c >= 0.95 * arraySum(bc), arrayCumSum(bc)), length(eb)))) AS p95

  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,

WITH grouped AS (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,

  FROM grouped WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
  UNION ALL

  FROM grouped WHERE arraySum(bc) > 0
)
ORDER BY time

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (
  SELECT toStartOfInterval(TimeUnix, INTERVAL 30 SECOND) AS t,
         Attributes['rpc'] AS series, max(Value) AS v

ORDER BY t

SELECT t AS time, series, greatest(0, v - lagInFrame(v) OVER (PARTITION BY series ORDER BY t)) AS delta
FROM (

  GROUP BY t, series

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['node'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'dcgm' AND MetricName = 'DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

  AND ServiceName = 'dcgm' AND MetricName = 'DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

  AND ServiceName = 'ray' AND MetricName = 'ray_node_cpu_utilization'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

  AND ServiceName = 'ray' AND MetricName = 'ray_node_mem_used'

  AND ServiceName = 'ray' AND MetricName = 'ray_node_gpus_utilization'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

  AND ServiceName = 'ray' AND MetricName = 'ray_object_store_memory'

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, Attributes['ray_node_type'] AS series, Value
FROM default.grl_metrics_landing
WHERE TimeUnix BETWEEN parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_start}') AND parseDateTime64BestEffort('${run_end}')
  AND ServiceName = 'ray' AND MetricName = 'ray_cluster_active_nodes'

FROM default.grl_metrics_landing

  AND ServiceName = 'ray' AND MetricName = 'ray_resources'
ORDER BY TimeUnix

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, TaskId, GroupId, RolloutIndex, Reward, NumTurns,
       DoneReason, PromptTokens, ResponseTokens, PolicyVersionStart,
       PolicyVersionCurrent
FROM default.grl_trajectories
WHERE RunId = '${run_id}'
ORDER BY TimeUnix DESC
LIMIT 500

SELECT TimeUnix AS time, TaskId, Reward, DoneReason, Body
FROM default.grl_trajectories
WHERE RunId = '${run_id}'
ORDER BY TimeUnix DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Trajectory detail (full prompt + response in Body)

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT RunId FROM default.grl_metrics WHERE RunId != '' ORDER BY RunId DESC
list.label: Run
list.name: run_id

list.definition: SELECT toString(min(TimeUnix)) FROM default.grl_metrics WHERE RunId = '${run_id}'
